"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\GraphicsWrapperTests.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\user\.utils\llvm-mingw\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\GraphicsWrapperTests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\GraphicsWrapperTests.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\user\.utils\llvm-mingw\bin\clang++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\GraphicsWrapperTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o GraphicsWrapperTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libGraphicsWrapperTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\GraphicsWrapperTests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
